full_text:
Cao Chun (Zihe) 曹純 (子和)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Chun (曹純), styledZihe (子和), was born in Qiao County, Pei County (Presently Bozhou City in Anhui Province). Led the Tiger and Leopard Cavalry and beheaded Yuan Tan. Had great control over his men. Cao Chun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Chun lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
